ideas.title: Live 'Agent Transparency Panel' — per pipeline run, render each agent's exact token budget + prompt/response payload
ideas.why: Grounded opportunity + world signal 'Agent-CLI wire transparency' and ontology 'Agent execution tracing' / 'Token budgeting' / 'Agent token overhead' — turns the factory's own automation into the auditable, disclosure-labeled artifact HN is demanding right now.

ideas.title: ⌘K command palette for instant search, related-post jumping, and section navigation
ideas.why: Destination lens (borrowing Linear/Vercel) + ontology 'Agent-computer interface (ACI)' — effortless content discovery is what makes a site bookmark-worthy, and this is an allowed palette (not the banned terminal).

ideas.title: Interactive mechanistic-interpretability explorer — a toy transformer whose attribution/path-patching light up on canvas as you probe it
ideas.why: World signal 'Mechanistic interpretability' + ontology 'Attribution patching', 'Path patching', 'Monosemanticity', 'Linear probing' — a Neuronpedia-style 'whoa' showpiece that teaches the exact concepts the brain reasons from.

ideas.title: 3D 'Code City' of the repo — buildings sized by LOC/churn, districts by module, rendered in WebGL
ideas.why: Ontology 'Code city' + 'Software cartography' — a big generative showpiece (borrowing CodeCity / GitHub Next) that makes the 461-commit/7d velocity visible and shareable instead of abstract.

ideas.title: Respect prefers-reduced-motion across the 3D knowledge graph and animated widgets
ideas.why: Ontology 'Calm technology' + accessibility priority — the #kg3d graph and vitals animate unconditionally, an a11y gap for motion-sensitive visitors and a real (not decorative) fix.

ideas.title: C2PA-style 'machine-written' disclosure badge on every autogenerated post
ideas.why: World signal 'AI-hype fatigue & disclosure demand' + ontology concepts 'AI content disclosure' and 'C2PA Content Credentials' — HN wants honest labeling of machine output and the site ships it unlabeled today.
